pi_items.source: setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 Azure DevOps API calls reference /TailwindTraders/ project path consistently
export_result.ps1 lines 34, 76 reference /TailwindTraders/_apis/git/repositories/TailwindTraders; setup_task.ps1 line 49 references same repository path

README.md shows expected YAML structure containing all five keywords: UsePythonVersion (python), pytest command, requirements.txt, trigger: section, include: - main branch reference. verifier.py lines 109-114 and 137-138 search for these exact keywords in YAML content

task.json description (line 5) explicitly states 'Trigger automatically on any push to the main branch AND on pull requests targeting main'. README.md lines 35-44 show expected YAML with both 'trigger' and 'pr' sections targeting main. export_result.ps1 checks for both CI triggers (line 58-59) and PR triggers (line 65)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a CI/CD pipeline for a Flask API in the TailwindTraders Azure DevOps project. The target repository is TailwindTraders. The pipeline must trigger on both the main branch and pull requests targeting main. The required keywords for the pipeline YAML are: python (with version 3.11), pytest (for test execution), requirements (for dependency installation from requirements.txt), trigger (for CI configuration), and main (for the target branch). The Flask repository contains app.py, models.py, routes.py, requirements.txt, and tests/test_app.py.
